message:
feat(benchmark): implement benchmark runner with full metrics

Implement bd-120 - benchmark runner CLI with warmup and reporting:

- Add FullBenchmarkResult with quality, speed, resource metrics
- Add SystemInfo and BenchmarkReport for full benchmark output
- Extend BenchmarkConfig with mrl_dims and eval_quality options
- Implement evaluate_embedder_quality() for IR metrics against corpus
- Implement run_full_benchmark() with factory pattern, cold start,
  warmup/measurement phases
- Add dot_product() and mean() helper functions
- Add 9 comprehensive tests for runner components

This high-impact bead unblocks 7 downstream tasks including reporters,
MRL sweep, and CLI integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
